zh.lifeSummary: Robert Tapp是Simon Tapp的兒子，於大約1515年出生在英國貝德福爾貝德福德。他於1542年6月22日與Margaret Barley在英國英格蘭貝德福爾米爾頓 歐內斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1556年在英國貝德福爾費爾莫沙安享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tapp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the early Middle English personal name Tapp (Old English Tæppa). The unrecorded Old English personal name is thought to be the first element of the placenames Taplow (Buckinghamshire), Tapners (Kent), Tappington (Kent), and Tapton (Derbyshire). See also Taplin .
English: possibly a nickname from Middle English tape ‘ribbon, tape’, or tappe ‘plug, tap’; ‘tap, knock’.

variants.name: Tappe
meanings: North German: metonymic occupational name for the owner of a tavern, a beer or wine tapper, from Middle Low German tappe ‘tap’.
English: variant of   Tapp  . This surname has now died out in Britain.

variants.name: Taplin
meanings: probably from Middle English Tolpayn, which may be a nickname for a miller, from Middle English tollen ‘to exact a charge on (something)’ + Middle English (Old French) pain ‘bread’, though the tolls that the miller exacted were on the flour he ground not the bread that was made from it. Alternatively, if -payne is a spelling of Middle English (Old French) peine ‘tax’, it may instead be a nickname for a tax collector.

variants.name: Tapscott
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from a lost Devon placename, perhaps in or near Barnstaple, recorded as Tappyscote in 1504–15. The placename may derive from an early Middle English personal name Tapp (Old English Tæppa), genitive Tappes, + Middle English cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’, but this cannot be certain due to a lack of medieval forms. See also Tapp for the Middle English personal name Tapp, which is most frequent in Devon.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Tapp was born about 1515, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England as the son of Simon Tapp. He married Margaret Barley on 22 June 1542, in Milton Ernest, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1556, in Felmersham, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Tapp est né environ 1515, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, fils de Simon Tapp. Il a épousé Margaret Barley le 22 juin 1542, à Milton Ernest, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1556, à Felmersham, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1556, nel Felmersham, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Tappは約1515年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードでSimon Tappの息子として生まれた。1542年6月22日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアミルトン エルネストでMargaret Barleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1556年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアフエルメルシャムで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Tapp(은)는 대략 1515년 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 Simon Tapp의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1542년 6월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 미턴 어니스트에서 Margaret Barley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1556년 영국 베드퍼드실르 프머샤에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

Его отца звали Simon Tapp. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Barley 22 июня 1542 г. в местности милтон эрнест, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1556 г. в местности фелмиршам, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.
